  "description": "Handyman Daige Properties is a private company in Abuja offering real estate development services. We prioritize delivering customized homes that meet our clients requirements.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Female Human Resources Assistant

Job Location: Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Nysc

Responsibilities&nbsp;


	Assist the Human Resource Mananger while on duty.


Requirements


	Minimum of Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree
	Proficiency in MS Office Suite (Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Outlook)
	Excellent written and verbal communication skills
	Ability to multitask and maintain confidentiality.
	Ability topay attention to details
	Must be willing to learn and ready to work
	Ability to be proactive
	Must be currently serving in NYSC.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: victoria.negedu@handymandaige.com using &#39;&#39;Female HR Assistant&quot; as the subject of the email.",

Female Human Resources Assistant Job at Handyman Daige Properties




        
    

        
        Handyman Daige Properties is a private company in Abuja offering real estate development services. We prioritize delivering customized homes that meet our clients requirements.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Female Human Resources Assistant

Job Location: Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Nysc

Responsibilities 


	Assist the Human Resource Mananger while on duty.


Requirements
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Minimum of Bachelor’s Degree
	Proficiency in MS Office Suite (Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Outlook)
	Excellent written and verbal communication skills
	Ability to multitask and maintain confidentiality.
	Ability topay attention to details
	Must be willing to learn and ready to work
	Ability to be proactive
	Must be currently serving in NYSC.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using ''Female HR Assistant" as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Business Development Manager & Operations Manager",
  "description": "Abuja Precast Concrete Limited is a leading manufacturer of high-quality precast concrete products in Nigeria. We specialize in producing Turkish-style concrete blocks, paving stones, and kerb stones designed to meet modern construction and infrastructure needs. Ourcompany uses advanced manufacturing technology to ensure durability, precision, and consistency in its products.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Business Development Manager &amp; Operations Manager

Job Location: Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking a highly driven Business Development Manager &amp; Operations Manager to support the growth and operational efficiency of Abuja Precast Concrete Limited, a leading producer of Turkish-standard precast concrete products, including concrete blocks, paving stones, and kerb stones.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for driving business growth, expanding customer base, and ensuring efficient logistics and delivery operations across project sites and customer locations.
	This role combines strategic business development with hands-on logistics coordination.


Position Overview


	The role focuses on increasing market penetration for precast concrete products while ensuring seamless movement of finished goods from production facilities to customers.
	The successful candidate will build strong client relationships, optimize distribution efficiency, and support revenue growth through structured business expansion and reliable logistics execution.


Key Responsibilities
Business Development:


	Develop and execute growth strategies for precast concrete products including blocks, paving stones, and kerb stones
	Identify and secure new business opportunities with contractors, real estate developers, and infrastructure projects
	Build and maintain strong relationships with new and existing clients.
	Conduct market research to identify demand trends, competitor activities, and new growth opportunities
	Support pricing strategies and commercial negotiations to drive profitability and market share
	Represent the company in industry engagements, site visits, and client meetings


Logistics &amp; Operations Management:


	Coordinate delivery of precast concrete products from production facility to customer sites
	Plan and optimize transportation schedules to ensure timely and cost-efficient deliveries
	Monitor inventory levels of finished goods to align production output with market demand
	Work closely with production teams to ensure order fulfillment and delivery readiness
	Supervise logistics partners, trucks, and dispatch operations for efficient distribution
	Ensure compliance with safety standards during loading, transportation, and offloading processes


Performance &amp; Reporting:


	Track sales performance, delivery timelines, and logistics efficiency metrics
	Prepare operational and business development reports for management review
	Recommend improvements to enhance distribution efficiency and customer satisfaction


Required Qualifications


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Business Administration, Marketing, Logistics, Supply Chain Management, or related field
	4&ndash;8 years of experience in business development, sales, and marketing within construction, manufacturing, or related industries
	Strong understanding of construction supply chains and building materials distribution
	Proven ability to manage client relationships and coordinate logistics operations
	Excellent negotiation, planning, and organizational skills
	Ability to work in a fast-paced production and field-based environment


Salary
N250,000 - N400,000 monthly.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: abujaprecastconcreteltd@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

  "validThrough": "2026-06-26",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",
  "hiringOrganization": {
    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Abuja Precast Concrete Limited"
    
  },

      "@type": "PostalAddress",

Business Development Manager & Operations Manager Job at Abuja Precast Concrete Limited




        
    

        
        Abuja Precast Concrete Limited is a leading manufacturer of high-quality precast concrete products in Nigeria. We specialize in producing Turkish-style concrete blocks, paving stones, and kerb stones designed to meet modern construction and infrastructure needs. Ourcompany uses advanced manufacturing technology to ensure durability, precision, and consistency in its products.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Business Development Manager & Operations Manager

Job Location: Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a highly driven Business Development Manager & Operations Manager to support the growth and operational efficiency of Abuja Precast Concrete Limited, a leading producer of Turkish-standard precast concrete products, including concrete blocks, paving stones, and kerb stones.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for driving business growth, expanding customer base, and ensuring efficient logistics and delivery operations across project sites and customer locations.
	This role combines strategic business development with hands-on logistics coordination.


Position Overview


	The role focuses on increasing market penetration for precast concrete products while ensuring seamless movement of finished goods from production facilities to customers.
	The successful candidate will build strong client relationships, optimize distribution efficiency, and support revenue growth through structured business expansion and reliable logistics execution.


Key Responsibilities
Business Development:


	Develop and execute growth strategies for precast concrete products including blocks, paving stones, and kerb stones
	Identify and secure new business opportunities with contractors, real estate developers, and infrastructure projects
	Build and maintain strong relationships with new and existing clients.
	Conduct market research to identify demand trends, competitor activities, and new growth opportunities
	Support pricing strategies and commercial negotiations to drive profitability and market share
	Represent the company in industry engagements, site visits, and client meetings


Logistics & Operations Management:


	Coordinate delivery of precast concrete products from production facility to customer sites
	Plan and optimize transportation schedules to ensure timely and cost-efficient deliveries
	Monitor inventory levels of finished goods to align production output with market demand
	Work closely with production teams to ensure order fulfillment and delivery readiness
	Supervise logistics partners, trucks, and dispatch operations for efficient distribution
	Ensure compliance with safety standards during loading, transportation, and offloading processes


Performance & Reporting:


	Track sales performance, delivery timelines, and logistics efficiency metrics
	Prepare operational and business development reports for management review
	Recommend improvements to enhance distribution efficiency and customer satisfaction


Required Qualifications


	Bachelor’s Degree in Business Administration, Marketing, Logistics, Supply Chain Management, or related field
	4–8 years of experience in business development, sales, and marketing within construction, manufacturing, or related industries
	Strong understanding of construction supply chains and building materials distribution
	Proven ability to manage client relationships and coordinate logistics operations
	Excellent negotiation, planning, and organizational skills
	Ability to work in a fast-paced production and field-based environment


Salary
N250,000 - N400,000 monthly.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

Responsibilties

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Full Stack Developer",
  "description": "Dana Group is a leading Nigerian conglomerate, a major contributor to the industrialization and economic growth of Nigeria for over five decades. With a maiden venture in pharmaceutical manufacturing in the mid-1980s, we have diversified into market-leading businesses across key sectors like: Pharmaceuticals, Automobile, Production of Household Plastics, Aviation etc . We are committed to providing quality products and services that positively impact daily life and well-being

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Full Stack Developer
Job Location: Oshodi-Isolo, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The Full Stack Developer will be responsible for designing, developing, and maintaining scalable web applications.
	You will work across both front-end and back-end systems, collaborating closely with product, design, and other engineering team members to deliver high-quality solutions.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and maintain web applications using modern frameworks and technologies
	Build responsive and user-friendly front-end interfaces
	Design and manage efficient back-end services and APIs
	Collaborate with cross-functional teams to define and implement new features
	Troubleshoot, debug, and optimize application performance
	Ensure application security, scalability, and reliability
	Participate in code reviews and follow best development practices


Required Skills &amp; Qualifications


	Proven experience as a Full Stack Developer or similar role
	Strong knowledge of HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and modern frameworks (React, Angular, or Vue)
	Experience with backend technologies (Node.js, Python, PHP, or similar)
	Familiarity with databases (MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, etc.)
	Understanding of RESTful APIs and version control systems (Git)
	Strong problem-solving and analytical skills
	Ability to work effectively in an onsite team environment
	Experience with cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, or GCP)
	Knowledge of DevOps practices and CI/CD pipelines
	Experience working in agile environments.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Applications to: vacancies@danagroup.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Full Stack Developer Job at Dana Group




        
    

        
        Dana Group is a leading Nigerian conglomerate, a major contributor to the industrialization and economic growth of Nigeria for over five decades. With a maiden venture in pharmaceutical manufacturing in the mid-1980s, we have diversified into market-leading businesses across key sectors like: Pharmaceuticals, Automobile, Production of Household Plastics, Aviation etc . We are committed to providing quality products and services that positively impact daily life and well-being

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Full Stack Developer
Job Location: Oshodi-Isolo, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The Full Stack Developer will be responsible for designing, developing, and maintaining scalable web applications.
	You will work across both front-end and back-end systems, collaborating closely with product, design, and other engineering team members to deliver high-quality solutions.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and maintain web applications using modern frameworks and technologies
	Build responsive and user-friendly front-end interfaces
	Design and manage efficient back-end services and APIs
	Collaborate with cross-functional teams to define and implement new features
	Troubleshoot, debug, and optimize application performance
	Ensure application security, scalability, and reliability
	Participate in code reviews and follow best development practices


Required Skills & Qualifications


	Proven experience as a Full Stack Developer or similar role
	Strong knowledge of HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and modern frameworks (React, Angular, or Vue)
	Experience with backend technologies (Node.js, Python, PHP, or similar)
	Familiarity with databases (MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, etc.)
	Understanding of RESTful APIs and version control systems (Git)
	Strong problem-solving and analytical skills
	Ability to work effectively in an onsite team environment
	Experience with cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, or GCP)
	Knowledge of DevOps practices and CI/CD pipelines
	Experience working in agile environments.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Applications to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

     

    

        Click here to Apply
